overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting ancient Egypt, showing a character walking along a dirt path at night past a stone temple, along a coastal trail, and approaching a statue shrine. The scene features cool blue moonlight lighting and Mediterranean vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: hillside path approaching ancient stone temple

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the illuminated stone temple on the hillside

entered.detail: large stone temple with columns situated on a rocky hilltop
cluster of palm trees lining the left side of the path
large rocky boulders and terrain on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: Walking along a dirt path toward an ancient stone temple situated on a rocky hillside. Palm trees line the left side of the path under a clear night sky with the temple illuminated against the dark blue horizon.

events.description: passing the temple and turning left onto a descending path revealing the coastal view
three mounted riders pass by on the left side of the path heading in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing past the temple, turning left and descending toward the coastal overlook

notable_agents.action: group of three riders on horseback passing by along the path

entered.detail: dark blue sea visible beyond the coastal cliffs
ancient settlement with buildings and harbor visible across the water
prominent rocky formation beside the descending trail

segments.scene_description: Continuing past the temple and turning left onto a descending path that reveals a coastal view with a distant harbor settlement. Three riders on horseback pass by in the opposite direction as the camera moves downhill toward the water.

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding coastal path surrounded by dense trees and vegetation

entered.detail: dense overhead tree cover creating a shaded corridor along the path

segments.scene_description: Walking along a shaded coastal trail surrounded by dense trees forming an overhead canopy. Large rock formations line the left side of the path while the sea is obscured by the thick vegetation.

events.description: emerging from the tree cover into the open shrine area with the illuminated marble statue

agents.ego_description: approaching the ancient shrine and observing the marble statue surrounded by offerings

entered.detail: tall classical marble statue of a robed figure holding an object
stone braziers with burning flames illuminating the shrine area
small burning candles and offerings at the base of the statue

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tree cover into an open ancient shrine featuring a tall marble statue surrounded by burning braziers and offerings. The coastal settlement is visible in the background across the water under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a hillside temple path down toward a moonlit coastal shrine. It begins by moving along a dirt path lined with palm trees toward an ancient stone temple perched on a rocky hillside under a dark blue night sky. As the camera passes the temple, the path turns and descends, opening up to reveal a distant harbor settlement and three riders on horseback passing in the opposite direction. The scene then shifts into a shaded coastal trail where dense trees form an overhead canopy and large rock formations line the way, momentarily obscuring the sea. Finally, the camera emerges from the thick vegetation into an open shrine, where a tall marble statue stands surrounded by burning braziers with the coastal settlement visible across the water in the background.
